title: Trans woman Sangeetha murder case: Coimbatore police form 3 teams to investigate - The News Minute
excerpt: Trans woman Sangeetha murder case: Coimbatore police form 3 teams to investigate  The News Minute
summary: A 60-year-old trans woman and District Transgender Association president, Sangeetha, was found dead in her residence in Coimbatore with injuries on her neck, and police are investigating the murder with no culprits identified yet.

title: UP : Five contract killers held in Prayagraj | Allahabad News
summary: Police in Prayagraj arrested five alleged contract killers for a reported Rs four lakh contract to eliminate Sadiyapur resident Choti Guru Kinnar and recovered firearms, bombs, and mobiles from them.
